nodes.context: Strategic alliance of Camorra clans in Naples, controlling drug trafficking and extortion since the 1990s.
Camorra clan, long-standing rival of the Secondigliano Alliance.
Founding clan of the Secondigliano Alliance, led by Gennaro Licciardi and later Maria Licciardi.
Founding clan of the Secondigliano Alliance, led by Edoardo Contini.
Founding clan of the Secondigliano Alliance, led by Francesco Mallardo.
Former ally of the Secondigliano Alliance, later split and engaged in gang war.
Clan within the Secondigliano Alliance, led by Patrizio Bosti.
Clan involved in the 2019 murder of Domenico Gargiulo in coordination with Licciardi and Abbinante clans.
Clan involved in the 2019 murder of Domenico Gargiulo in coordination with Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans.
'Ndrangheta clan allied with the Secondigliano Alliance in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: Currently, its considered by law enforcement authorities to be one of the two most powerful criminal organizations within the Camorra, alongside the Mazzarella clan , a long-standing rival of the Alliance.
edges.context: The Secondigliano Alliance and Mazzarella clan are long-standing rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Founding clans : Contini clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , Di Lauro clan , Rinaldi clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan , Commisso 'ndrina
edges.context: Licciardi clan is a founding clan and ally of the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The group is believed by the authorities to be allied with the Commisso 'ndrina in the trafficking and sale of cocaine and marijuana from South America, via the Netherlands.
edges.context: The Secondigliano Alliance is allied with Commisso 'ndrina in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: The Lo Russo clan , then an important ally of the Alliance, disagreed and repackaged the shipment for sale on the streets, resulting in the deaths of many. ... The Lo Russo clan eventually split from the alliance, leading to a violent gang war against the other clans which claimed 120 lives in Naples and the surrounding region.
edges.context: Lo Russo clan was initially an ally but later split and engaged in a violent gang war with the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Among those who were arrested were the wives of the bosses of the Bosti , Mallardo, Licciardi and Contini clans, as well as their lieutenants, children, grandchildren and entrepreneurs who worked for the alliance.
edges.context: Bosti clan is a component clan within the Secondigliano Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: The killing, reportedly orchestrated by both the Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans in coordination with the Abbinante clan, was interpreted by prosecutors as both an act of strategic retribution and an assertion of territorial dominance.
edges.context: Licciardi and Sautto-Ciccarelli clans coordinated in the 2019 murder of Domenico Gargiulo.
